active_gate.action: Repair actual consumed-token parity, freeze the three typed LLM roles and budgets, preregister, then run a sealed n>=100 comparison against flat/vector with removal and role-shuffle controls.

claim_boundary: Engineering sequencing and evidence-readiness only. SATISFIED means that the named receipt or packet was revalidated inside its narrow registered scope. READY, ACTION_REQUIRED, or REJECTED is not a prediction, activation approval, or evidence that HSWM already learns weights, topology, transfer, or consolidation.

gates.action: Preserve the replicated typed source-policy answer actuation as a narrow L0 starting point.
gates.completion_evidence: Fresh seed-5 R2 heldout 6/6 typed versus 2/6 no-memory, four improvements, 24 calls, and LakatoTree server-regenerated replay.

evidence.claim_boundary: Fresh L0 answer-interface source-policy replication and deterministic server replay only; no result-to-credit-to-deltaW, Agent A-to-B transfer, learned topology rewiring, or consolidation claim.

gates.failure_boundary: Does not establish a generally learned compiler, Delta-W, Agent-A-to-B transfer, topology learning, or consolidation.

gates.action: Keep the A/B/MERGED-only ridge-conformal router rejected and do not tune its abstention threshold again.
gates.completion_evidence: All 54 standard cells failed, primary delta was zero, and even the frozen-arm oracle could not reach the registered minimum threshold.
gates.failure_boundary: Rejects this router-only action space, not every possible learned router or the HSWM programme.

gates.action: Preserve the neutral slow/fast bond readout and Gate-0 compiler boundary without making an efficacy claim.
gates.completion_evidence: Pure bond readout, full-candidate Gate-0 compiler, replay contract, attack tests, and LakatoTree DRAFT groundwork node remain hash-bound.

evidence.next_gate: full-candidate score-component pack plus neutral exact frozen-B2 reproduction before fitting or preregistration

gates.failure_boundary: Development headroom and module tests are not evidence that a learner can recover the oracle room.

gates.action: Repair actual consumed-token parity, freeze the three typed LLM roles and budgets, preregister, then run a sealed n>=100 comparison against flat/vector with removal and role-shuffle controls.
gates.completion_evidence: Recomputed sealed F1 judgment has equal calls and consumed-token budget, typed beats flat and vector, both role ablations lose the effect, and every arm has at least 100 registered items.

evidence.claim_boundary: No scientific efficacy claim; use this result only to debug and freeze F1.

gates.failure_boundary: The R4 4-item run is development-only: typed tied vector, all paired lower bounds included zero, and every item failed consumed-token parity. More calls or a self-asserted judgment cannot unlock the next gate.

gates.action: Build reproduction, full 2Wiki, and full MuSiQue component packs on the guarded compute path; lock and accept all three with exact neutral and frozen-B2 replay.
gates.completion_evidence: A real hswm-b22-gate0-acceptance-receipt/v1 reopens its lock and all three packs and returns learner_allowed=true while scientific_claim_allowed=false.
gates.failure_boundary: No fast learner fitting, preregistration, or outcome inspection is allowed before this acceptance receipt validates.

gates.action: Run outcome -> used-bond eligibility -> fast candidate -> validated slow Delta-W promotion with static-update, random-credit, shuffled-eligibility, no-promotion, flat/vector, and causal-removal controls.
gates.completion_evidence: The harness rejudges a sealed raw packet: the promoted snapshot differs from base, later frozen behavior improves on component-disjoint work, retention/canary hold, and removal restores the base map and erases the gain.
gates.failure_boundary: Fast attention without a promoted persistent snapshot is FAST_ONLY; a gain that survives removal is not durable semantic-weight learning.

gates.action: Let Agent A write only an accepted semantic-weight packet; hide its transcript, freeze Agent B byte-for-byte, and compare unseen transfer against no-A, transcript, flat, vector, and removal arms.
gates.completion_evidence: The harness rejudges a sealed raw packet: frozen B improves on fresh component-disjoint work, beats flat/vector, has no cache/transcript leakage, and causal removal erases the gain.
gates.failure_boundary: Exact-query cache reuse, B parameter or prompt changes, transcript visibility, or an unbound weight snapshot is not shared-network transfer.

gates.action: Only after weight-only transfer, open exactly one typed CONNECT operation through compiler, fresh evaluation, retention, canary, approval, CAS activation, and removal ablation.
gates.completion_evidence: One immutable topology candidate changes frozen-B behavior, beats weight-only and flat/vector controls, preserves provenance and retention, and rolls back by supersession.
gates.failure_boundary: No joint weight/router/topology search and no CONNECT/SEPARATE/SPECIALIZE claim from transient routing frequency.

gates.action: Measure route collapse, specialist starvation, forgetting, replay drift, recursion budgets, cost, rollback, and consolidation over long horizons.
gates.completion_evidence: Preregistered stability and retention bands hold across multiple epochs, seeds, regimes, and a second benchmark with bounded cost and deterministic recovery.
gates.failure_boundary: Short notebook gains or a single stable replay do not establish scalable continual HSWM learning.

next_actions.action: Repair actual consumed-token parity, freeze the three typed LLM roles and budgets, preregister, then run a sealed n>=100 comparison against flat/vector with removal and role-shuffle controls.

programme_feedback: HSWM remains the hypergraph Semantic Weight Map whose typed macro-function nodes are executed by LLMs; the ordered gates test that hard core rather than replacing it with a generic workflow.
R4 is useful negative development evidence: exact three-call structure and ablations worked, but actual token parity failed and typed did not beat vector.
Exactly one active experimental gate is exposed. Downstream evidence supplied before its prerequisites is refused instead of ignored.
P1v5 and P2 status is recomputed from raw causal packets; a copied verdict string cannot unlock the sequence.
Topology remains closed until persistent Delta-W and weight-only frozen-agent transfer are both causally supported.
LakatoTree receives this harness as DRAFT engineering ordering only; no prediction or scientific result is registered by the harness.
